query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS line_skip_credits (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  credits INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  UNIQUE KEY unique_user (userId)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 45x8Wz3k6WBARWw.root --database C3bFVoBEaMVXmYZLRysziz --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS line_skip_credits (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  credits INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  UNIQUE KEY unique_user (userId)
);
